feedback.text: This initiative seems great, but what we would love to see is consideration for the preservation of video games also. They certainly contain art that deserves to be preserved. This might be right up your alley! If you're open to it, wed really appreciate it if you could take a look at the purpose of the initiative with that in mind, and maybe even check out Ross Scotts video on the topic (YouTube: Accursed Farms). Its part of the broader Stop Killing Games effort, and it seems like something that could align well with your goals. Thanks for the work you're doing and for considering this!
